description: Professional Admin Panel - Complete redesign of all admin pages with DataTable, modals, collapsible sidebar, and enhanced functionality.
steps: Rewrite src/features/admin/components/admin-sidebar.tsx - Professional sidebar: Collapsible (toggle button at bottom to collapse to icons-only mode, stores preference in localStorage). Logo + 'Admin' text at top. Nav sections grouped: Main (Dashboard), Content (Listings, Categories), Users (Users, Reports), System (Settings). Each nav item has icon + label + optional badge count. Active state with gold left border accent. At bottom: admin user avatar + name + 'Back to Site' link. Smooth width transition animation on collapse.

Rewrite src/app/admin/layout.tsx - Keep existing auth check logic. Update layout to support collapsible sidebar (dynamic left padding). Add top bar with: breadcrumbs, admin name display, notification bell icon, 'View Site' link.

Rewrite src/app/admin/page.tsx - Professional admin dashboard: Stats cards row (Total Users, Total Listings, Active Listings, Pending Reports) using StatsCard with trend indicators. Revenue placeholder chart (styled card with 'Coming Soon' overlay). Recent activity feed (last 10 actions - new listings, new users, reports - from DB or empty state). Quick action buttons (Add Category, View Reports, Export Data placeholder). System health indicators (DB connected badge green/red, Storage status).

Rewrite src/app/admin/users/page.tsx - Professional user management: DataTable with columns (Avatar, Name, Email, Role badge, Listings count, Joined date, Status, Actions). Search by name/email. Filter tabs (All, Active, Banned). Role badges (user=gray, admin=gold). Actions dropdown per row (View Details, Change Role, Ban/Unban, Delete with confirm). Bulk actions bar (appears when checkboxes selected): Ban Selected, Delete Selected. User detail: modal/sheet showing full profile info, their listings, activity log.

Rewrite src/app/admin/listings/page.tsx - Professional listing management: DataTable with columns (Thumbnail image, Title, Category, Seller name, Price, Status badge, Date, Actions). Status filter tabs (All, Active, Pending, Sold, Removed). Search by title. Actions dropdown (View, Approve, Reject, Feature/Unfeature, Remove with confirm). Quick status change buttons. Listing detail modal showing full info + images.

Rewrite src/app/admin/categories/page.tsx - Professional category management: List view with drag handle icons (visual only - actual reorder via up/down buttons), category icon, name, slug, listing count, enabled/disabled toggle, actions (Edit, Delete). Add Category button opens modal: name input, slug (auto-generated from name), icon picker (grid of available Lucide icons as selectable buttons), description, parent category select for subcategories. Edit uses same modal pre-filled.

Rewrite src/app/admin/reports/page.tsx - Professional report management: DataTable with columns (Reporter name, Listing title, Reason badge, Severity indicator, Date, Status badge, Actions). Severity color coding (Low=blue, Medium=yellow, High=red). Status filter tabs (All, Pending, Resolved, Dismissed). Report detail view (expandable row or modal): shows reporter info, listing preview card, full reason + description, quick actions (Resolve, Dismiss, Remove Listing, Ban User). Link to view the offending listing.

Create src/app/admin/settings/page.tsx - Admin settings page: Site Settings section (site name input, site description textarea, contact email, support phone - all localStorage-saved for now). Commission section (commission rate percentage input - UI placeholder only). Maintenance Mode toggle (shows warning banner site-wide when enabled - stored in localStorage). About section showing app version 'V4.0.0', environment info.
acceptance_criteria: Running 'unset NODE_OPTIONS && npx --yes next build' succeeds with no errors
Admin sidebar is collapsible with smooth animation
Admin dashboard shows stats cards and activity feed
Users page has searchable DataTable with role badges and action dropdowns
Listings page has filterable DataTable with status tabs and thumbnail images
Categories page has add/edit modal with icon picker
Reports page has severity indicators and detail view
Settings page exists at /admin/settings with site config options
All existing admin functionality (auth check, role check, data fetching) still works
verification: Run 'unset NODE_OPTIONS && npx --yes next build' in /projects/sandbox/Khmer-Store and confirm zero errors and admin routes all listed
